response.overview: DropStitch is an international all girls snowboard film celebrating the achievements of girls at the forefront of the sport. DropStitch is about bringing talent, inspiration and devotion to the general population, introducing snowboarding to girls who have never tried, and inspiring those who have, to follow their dream. Featuring interviews, rider sections and documented film trips, DropStitch brings you the lifestyle of being a professional female snowboarder. Filmed on location in New Zealand, USA, Iceland, Japan, Czech Republic and Europe.
response.title: Dropstitch: An All-Girl Snowboard Film
